title: rhamnella franguloides
intro: Rhamnella franguloides, also known as Korean evodia or yukmijihwang, is a plant species native to Korea and China, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce a fever and relieve symptoms associated with colds and flu. The health benefits of Rhamnella franguloides include its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
